8590","abstract_url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5270233016107017&aigc_abstract_fragment=1022:2329945270235260059707","url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5270233016107017&aigc_abstract_fragment=1022:2329945270235260059707"},{"object_type":"aigc_abstract_fragment","abstract_mid":"5270235265631198","abstract_id":"5270235260059711","end_time":134000,"begin_time":84000,"id":"1022:2329945270235260059711","text":"街头收银勒索布商，施压逼交月钱，展现欺压行径。","author_id":"5920136112","display_name":"AI总结","author_mid":"5270235265631198","abstract_url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5270233016107017&aigc_abstract_fragment=1022:2329945270235260059711","url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5270233016107017&aigc_abstract_fragment=1022:2329945270235260059711"},{"object_type":"aigc_abstract_fragment","abstract_mid":"5270235265369668","abstract_id":"5270235259797542","end_time":166000,"begin_time":134000,"id":"1022:2329945270235259797542","text":"强抢民女未遂，怒砸摊位，扬言‘老子就是王法’。","author_id":"5920136112","display_name":"AI总结","author_mid":"5270235265369668","abstract_url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5270233016107017&aigc_abstract_fragment=1022:2329945270235259797542","url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5270233016107017&aigc_abstract_fragment=1022:2329945270235259797542"},{"object_type":"aigc_abstract_fragment","abstract_mid":"5270235265370255","abstract_id":"5270235260059715","end_time":208000,"begin_time":166000,"id":"1022:2329945270235260059715","text":"多次重演打斗、倒地、死亡等动作戏，强调表演节奏与完成度。","author_id":"5920136112","display_name":"AI总结","author_mid":"5270235265370255","abstract_url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5270233016107017&aigc_abstract_fragment=1022:2329945270235260059715","url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5270233016107017&aigc_abstract_fragment=1022:2329945270235260059715"}],"sync_like":0,"async_media_abstract":0,"split_action_log":{"act_type":1,"act_code":7792,"oid":"1034:5270233016107017","uuid":5270233119195205,"cardid":"","lcardi
